denial_letter_text:
NOTICE OF ADVERSE BENEFIT DETERMINATION

Date of Notice: 02/18/2026
Cigna Open Access Plus (employer-sponsored group health plan)
Member ID: W102106454          Group #: GRP-1266
Authorization / Reference #: PA-2026-140463
Claim #: CLM-2026-202099
Date of Service (requested): 01/29/2026
Treating provider (as submitted): Summit Specialty Associates

Dear Member,

This document is notice of an adverse benefit determination. We received your provider's prior authorization request on 01/31/2026 for Pessary fitting plus surgical consult related to Uterine prolapse, symptomatic (N81.2). After clinical review, we are unable to approve this request.

CASE SUMMARY
Service requested: Pessary fitting plus surgical consult
Diagnosis (as submitted): Uterine prolapse, symptomatic (N81.2)
Denial code: CO-197 — Precertification/authorization absent — service requires prior approval before the date of service.
Clinical policy applied: Coverage Policy 126 under Cigna Medical Coverage Policy (CPG) and Milliman Care Guidelines (MCG)

EXPLANATION OF DECISION
This determination is based on a plan exclusion. State coverage mandates do not alter the terms of this plan for this determination.
Our review applied the criteria in Coverage Policy 126 and your plan's Summary Plan Description (SPD), Section 4 — Medical Benefits and Utilization Management. The documentation submitted does not demonstrate that the service is medically necessary for this member at this time. Prior authorization for Pessary fitting plus surgical consult is denied because a required peer-to-peer review was not completed in the allowed window. Clinical information may be discussed during appeal submission.

Specifically, the information provided does not satisfy the utilization-management requirements associated with missing peer to peer. The clinical notes reviewed did not include sufficient detail to confirm that plan criteria were met. The requesting provider may submit additional records, but the current file does not support approval.

Diagnosis and procedure codes used in this determination are available upon request, including plain-language descriptions, as required by applicable federal standards.

If your provider wishes to discuss this determination, they may contact our physician review line. Any discussion must occur within the timeframe described in your plan materials.

YOUR RIGHT TO INFORMATION
You may request a copy of your claim file and the clinical criteria we used in this determination. Submit your request to the address on this notice or through your plan's member portal.

APPEAL RIGHTS
You have the right to appeal this determination. If this denial is upheld after internal review, you may have the right to request an independent external review of our decision at no cost to you, subject to applicable federal and state requirements. To file a standard appeal, send a written request and supporting medical records within 180 days of the date of this notice. Include your member identification number (W102106454) and reference PA-2026-140463. You may also have the right to receive, upon request and without charge, copies of documents relevant to this determination.

Please note that benefits are subject to all terms, exclusions, and limitations of your group health plan document. This letter constitutes the formal adverse determination for the service identified above.

Sincerely,

Cigna Health Care Management
Medical Review Unit
clinical_context: The 27-year-old member has Uterine prolapse, symptomatic (N81.2). She has been treated under commercial coverage with Pessary fitting plus surgical consult recommended as the next appropriate step. Stage II prolapse; bulge symptoms; failed kegel program. Submitted documentation supports medical necessity for Pessary fitting plus surgical consult in the setting of Uterine prolapse, symptomatic (N81.2); the denial letter does not discuss those records or cite the objective findings in the file.
